author: Rafael Santos
description: Classify documents using the Traffic Light Protocol (TLP). Visual selector in the properties panel, status bar indicator, and automatic PDF header/footer badge generation for Better Export PDF. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: TLP Classification

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# v1.1.2

Versão de manutenção. Sem mudanças de comportamento visível para o utilizador.

## Correções

- **CSS sem `!important`**: a regra que esconde o input nativo do painel de
  propriedades (substituído pelo nosso widget de badge) deixa de usar
  `!important` e passa a vencer por especificidade
  (`.metadata-property-value .tlp-native-hidden`).

## Publicação

- Este release é construído e publicado pelo workflow de CI
  (`.github/workflows/release.yml`), que gera **artifact attestations**
  (`actions/attest-build-provenance`) para `main.js` e `styles.css`,
  permitindo verificar criptograficamente a proveniência dos assets.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rafamss/obsidian-tlp-classification/compare/1.1.1...1.1.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Improvements

- **Artifact attestations** — Release assets (`main.js`, `styles.css`) now include build provenance attestations, allowing users to cryptographically verify they were built from this repository.
- **Reproducible builds** — `package-lock.json` is now committed and the CI uses `npm ci` for deterministic dependency resolution.
- **Removed `builtin-modules` dependency** — Replaced with native `module.builtinModules` from Node.js, as recommended by the [e18e initiative](https://e18e.dev/).
- **Fixed placeholder links in README** — All documentation links now point to the correct repository.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rafamss/obsidian-tlp-classification/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
